title: Project Miner Local PM Operating Queue Disclosure Controls
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scan burden by wrapping only the existing /pm-review/import-intake Local PM Operating Queue panel in a browser-native, default-open disclosure control while preserving its placement inside Review Snapshot Detail after the snapshot, six derived queue items, item order, status pills, dynamic count text, export references, no-storage behavior, no-authority wording, read seam, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Convert the existing Local PM Operating Queue panel wrapper to a native default-open disclosure control.
Preserve the existing pm-operating-queue id and Local PM operating queue aria label.
Keep the operating queue panel inside Review Snapshot Detail after the Local PM Intake Snapshot panel.
Preserve the queue's six derived items, item order, status pills, dynamic count text, export references, no-storage behavior, and no-authority wording.

Preserve existing storage behavior, read seams, route links, quick-jump rail, output actions, output statuses, helper disclosures, detail disclosures, handoff-guide disclosure, workflow-map disclosure, open-items disclosure, and snapshot disclosure.

Add focused smoke coverage proving default-open state, collapse/reopen behavior, hidden/visible operating-queue items, unchanged item count, absence of operating-queue disclosure-state localStorage keys, and continued PM Lane 083 authority guard posture.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 093 recommended PM Lane 094 as Local PM Operating Queue Disclosure Controls. The recommendation was accepted as a browser-local AI/orchestration operating-queue ergonomics slice. A separate read-only sidecar completed a PM Lane 095 scout and recommended Local Import Exception Decision Register Disclosure Controls as the next non-overlapping lane, with no write ownership in this tranche.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page operating-queue panel wrapper markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for default-open operating-queue disclosure controls and no persisted collapse state.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No operating queue item label change.
No operating queue item order change.
No operating queue item count change.
No operating queue status pill change.
No operating queue dynamic count behavior change.
No operating queue export reference change.
No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
